title: cyperus planifolius f. gracilis
intro: Cyperus planifolius f. gracilis, also known as slender umbrella sedge or Cyperus gracilis, is a perennial sedge native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus planifolius f. gracilis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or poultice, and can also be used as a herbal tea or added to topical creams and ointments for its therapeutic benefits.
